fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(marketplace): add 68 unit tests for pure marketplace helpers

Tests cover:
- _env_flag: all truthy/falsy values, missing env, whitespace
- _normalize_identity: None, str, int, whitespace
- _ids_equal: str/str, int/str tolerance, None/empty guards
- _idempotency_compose_key: composition, anonymous, whitespace strip
- _normalize_idempotency_key: valid, empty, too-long, invalid chars, Header obj
- _idempotency_get/_set: roundtrip, TTL expiry, LRU eviction
- _db_session_available: real mock, missing attrs, None, dict
- _to_cents/_to_dollars: rounding, zero, roundtrip
- _row_to_listing: price conversion, None handling, datetime isoformat, id normalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: welcome email, real upload, onboarding persistence, OG image, live dashboard

- Welcome email: Resend integration sends branded HTML email on registration
- Upload dialog: connected to real /api/documents/upload endpoint with
  progress tracking, error handling, file size validation
- Onboarding: persists use case, LLM provider, API key to Supabase
  via new /api/onboarding route; uploads files during onboarding flow
- OG Image: dynamic 1200x630 OpenGraph image with brand identity
- Dashboard overview: connected to Supabase via useWorkspace hook,
  shows real document count, query count, storage usage, user plan
- useWorkspace hook: reusable client-side hook for workspace data

commit.message:
feat: add `bashrs corpus label` command for external JSONL (KAIZEN-094)

New CLI command labels arbitrary JSONL files with linter findings:
- Reads "script", "text", or "input" field from each JSONL line
- Runs bashrs linter, filters SEC/DET/IDEM security rules
- Outputs labeled JSONL with: label (0/1), classification, findings
  (rule, message, CWE, CVSS score), finding_count
- Preserves original fields from input
- Wired as `bashrs corpus label --input <file> [--output <file>]`
- CLI integration test (test_SSB007)

Used by SSC v12 pipeline to label verificar output and external data.

commit.message:
fix: strip ArgoCD iframe-blocking headers via Traefik middleware

ArgoCD sets X-Frame-Options: sameorigin and CSP: frame-ancestors 'self'
which prevents the Educates dashboard iframe from embedding it. Add a
Traefik Middleware in the argocd namespace that removes both headers,
and annotate the Ingress to use it.

commit.message:
security: fix esbuild vulnerability with npm override

Added npm override to force esbuild to ^0.27.0 to resolve moderate
severity vulnerability (CVE-2024-xxxx) in esbuild <=0.24.2.

The vulnerability was in @esbuild-kit/core-utils which depended
on vulnerable esbuild versions. The override ensures all packages
use esbuild 0.27.0+, which is not affected.

Before: 4 moderate vulnerabilities (esbuild <=0.24.2)
After: 0 vulnerabilities

This fixes the failing security scan in GitHub Actions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add whoami Phase 0 to default user detection for SUSE compatibility

The 3-phase user detection (wsl.conf → UID≥1000 → UID≥500) returned
None on SUSE Linux Enterprise because WSL can configure the default
user via the Windows registry, bypassing wsl.conf and /etc/passwd.

Add `whoami` as Phase 0 — it returns exactly the user WSL launches,
regardless of configuration method. Also make Phases 2-3 error-tolerant
so a failed awk command doesn't skip subsequent phases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: clip building thumbnail to portrait bounds in info panel (#420)

## Summary
- Town Center (and other large building sprites) overflowed the 64x64
portrait area in the info panel
- Changed `TextureRect.expand_mode` from `EXPAND_FIT_WIDTH_PROPORTIONAL`
to `EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE` so the stretch mode respects the container size
- Added `clip_contents = true` on the parent `ColorRect` as a safety net

## Test plan
- [x] All 36 info panel tests pass
- [ ] Visual verification: select Town Center in-game, confirm thumbnail
fits within portrait area

Closes roots-of-reason-mo6t

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Signed-off-by: Dave Tashner <davetashner@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Dave Tashner <davetashner@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: replace useFrame with OrbitControls change event for shadow frustum

useFrame conflicted with frameloop="demand", causing shadow render loop
and timing races. OrbitControls change event only fires on camera move,
naturally compatible with demand mode.

commit.message:
fix: graceful shutdown, remove obsolete compose version, expand roadmap

- docker-compose: remove deprecated version field (Compose v2+)
- docker-compose: add stop_grace_period 30s so Docker gives enough
  time for UniFi + MongoDB to shut down cleanly before sending SIGKILL
- docker-entrypoint: exit 0 in exit_handler instead of exit ${?} which
  was returning the mongo shutdown command exit code as the container
  exit code, making clean shutdowns look like crashes
- README: add mem_limit, depends_on healthcheck, and MongoDB auth items
  to roadmap

commit.message:
feat: full system function — auth membrane, command actions, billing/advertising surfaces

Phase 1: Auth membrane
- middleware.ts: Supabase SSR session check, redirect unauthenticated to /login
- login: reads ?redirect= param, returns user to originally requested page
- washbay routes: cookie-based auth on GET/POST/PATCH
- debug routes: x-ak-admin-key gating

Phase 2: Command action path
- /api/command/seal: POST route, calls sealObligation() with receipt as mandatory consequence
- /command: rewritten with AkShell design system, working Seal Closure + Inspect drawer

Phase 3: Billing ops + advertising reads
- /api/billing-ops/stats: structural counts + projection surface (core.v_receipts) for recent receipts
- /billing-ops: real pipeline counts from API, no longer static placeholder
- /api/advertising/feed: projection surfaces (v_next_actions, v_receipts) filtered by face=advertising
- /advertising: obligations grouped by severity + recent receipts from API

Phase 4: Import normalization
- supabaseBrowser.ts: re-export shim pointing to canonical @/lib/supabase/supabaseBrowser

Core rules enforced:
- Middleware never substitutes for route authorization
- Every API route independently validates auth, fails closed
- Operator-facing reads prefer projection views over base tables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 404 on first click for rewrite-proxied apps from research page (#792)

Apps served via Vercel rewrites (e.g. /us/watca, /us/taxsim) get a 404
on first click from the research page because React Router's <Link>
intercepts the navigation client-side. Use a plain <a> tag for app
cards so the browser makes a full server request that hits the Vercel
rewrite rule.

commit.message:
run tab: fix double-drop bug + replace native selects with custom ModelPicker

Double-drop: chain-empty-drop was calling handleCanvasDrop(e) without stopPropagation,
causing the event to bubble to the canvas onDrop and add the same plan twice.

ModelPicker: replaces all native <select> model dropdowns with a custom component
showing color-coded dots, FAST/BALANCED/POWERFUL badges, description, speed/cost/effort
pills. Used in Run (exec+review), Run (retry footer), Plan tab, and Chat tab.

commit.message:
Replace broken Creative→Video flow with QuickVideoWizard

Previous: 'Create Video' navigated to /video-marketing which loaded the most recent existing campaign at the Videos step — completely wrong UX.

New flow: clicking 'Create Video' opens a 3-step modal wizard (QuickVideoWizard.jsx):
- Step 1: Confirm the image + optional subject/product name
- Step 2: Choose video type (Product Hero / Talking Head / Lifestyle / Hands-On Demo / Custom) + free-text description + mood tags
- Step 3: Duration (5/8/10s) + aspect ratio (9:16/1:1/16:9) + auto-composed editable prompt → Generate

Calls /api/video/generate-quick with image URL (image-to-video mode) + polls for result. Shows video preview + Download button on completion.

VideoMarketingPage reads creative_video_import from localStorage on mount and opens the wizard; existing campaign flow is completely unaffected.

commit.message:
feat: full wizard state persistence — survive Stripe, localStorage clears, new devices (#194)

The generation wizard state was only stored in Zustand/localStorage. On mobile,
navigating to Stripe and back can wipe localStorage, losing the user's script,
product selection, format, and all composite previews.

This PR makes EVERYTHING recoverable from a single DB query.

### Migration
- Add `format TEXT` and `cta_style TEXT` to `generations` table
- `language` and `video_provider` already existed from earlier migrations

### Edge function (generate-video)
- Save `format`, `cta_style`, `video_provider` to the generation INSERT at
  status=awaiting_approval (the script-review step before payment)
- Combined with existing `language`, `mode`, `video_quality` — the full
  wizard config is now in the DB record

### Hook: useLastPendingGeneration
- React Query hook that fetches the most recent awaiting_approval generation
- staleTime: 30s — frequent enough to catch fresh generations
- Guards on isSignedIn via Clerk

### Generate page: auto-restore on mount
- If store.pendingGenerationId is null AND store.productId is null (empty session):
  → call resumeFromGeneration() with script, product, persona, mode, quality
  → set format, ctaStyle, language, videoProvider from DB
  → useCompositeCache becomes enabled (product+persona+format now set)
  → existing DB→localStorage sync effect restores composite paths
  → existing re-sign effect displays the preview images
- Result: user returns to exact script-review step, previews included

### Full restore chain after Stripe back-button (mobile)
localStorage cleared → useLastPendingGeneration fetches DB record →
auto-restore effect → resumeFromGeneration (step 5) + format/settings →
useCompositeCache enabled → DB paths → re-sign → previews displayed ✓

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
